2. Combating the sexual abuse and sexual exploitation of children and child sexual abuse material and replacing Council Framework Decision 2004/68/JHA (recast) (debate)
Video of the speeches
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Presidente. 芒聙聯 L'ordine del giorno reca la relazione di Jeroen Lenaers, a nome della commissione per le libert脙聽 civili, la giustizia e gli affari interni, sulla脗聽proposta di direttiva del Parlamento europeo e del Consiglio relativa alla lotta contro l'abuso e lo sfruttamento sessuale dei minori e il materiale pedopornografico, e che sostituisce la decisione quadro 2004/68/GAI del Consiglio (rifusione) (COM(2024)0060 - C9-0028/2024 - 2024/0035(COD) (A10-0097/2025).

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Jeroen Lenaers, rapporteur. 芒聙聯 Madam脗聽President, dear Commissioner, dear colleagues, I know it's customary to always thank the shadows and colleagues for the great work we've done together, but I would like to say this time I really mean it from the bottom of my heart. I think we had an excellent cooperation from left to right, leading to a unanimous adoption of this report in the LIBE Committee. It is a huge, huge step in further protecting our children in Europe, which is so important.

Personally, a couple of years ago, I met a father whose child 芒聙聯 a little girl 芒聙聯 was abused. In the investigation they discovered that the abuser had made use of a so-called 'paedo manual': an instruction book on how to win the trust of children, how to abuse and exploit them, and how to get away with it. Hundreds of pages of sickening, horrific, disgusting content. The worst of it was that this book, as such, was not even banned in any country of the European Union. This father started a fight. He managed to get it banned in the Netherlands, in Germany and Belgium. Today, in this Parliament, we take a huge step in getting this type of books banned throughout the whole of Europe. So I would like to thank Marcel Jeninga and his Stichting Strijd Tegen Misbruik for his fight. He's with us here today in the plenary Chamber. Thank you very much; we will keep joining your fight.

But this is not the only thing that we do with this legislation. One of the things that is most concerning for us all is the huge increase of the use of artificial intelligence when it comes to generating child sexual abuse material. Based on the statistics of NCMEC, there is an increase of over 1脗聽000脗聽% in the last year alone. With this legislation, we criminalise AI-generated child sexual abuse material in the same way that we do with real child sexual abuse material, because these models have to train on real material. From AI-generated child sexual abuse material, it's only a very small step to abusing children in real life.

It needs to stop, just like we need to stop other technological developments when it comes to abusing children, like live streaming, when people in Europe are sitting behind their laptops or their screens, while children thousands of miles away from here are being abused in front of a camera because those people here in Europe pay for it. We need to adapt our legislative framework to be able to fight those people.

A third important element is the statute of limitations. One very specific thing about victims of child sexual abuse is that very often they are only ready much later in life to come forward and to file charges against the perpetrators, and I would like to thank the very brave men and women I met from the Brave Movement and their testimonies on how it is for victims of child sexual abuse to become a victim, to realise that you are a victim and to have the courage to file charges against your abuser. Many times, like I said, it takes a long time. In many Member States we see that by the time victims are ready to file these charges, the justice system says 'I'm sorry, but the deadline has run out'.

There cannot be a deadline for justice when it comes to child sexual abuse, and this is also one of the key innovations in this legislation 芒聙聯 we will make sure that victims of child sexual abuse will get justice, can get justice, and we will support them on that way.

There are many other measures when it comes to the clear definition of consent, when it comes to a child-centred approach on investigations and victim support, when it comes to more cooperation between different authorities and the renewed focus on prevention.

This is an ambitious file, I know, but can you ever be ambitious enough when it comes to protecting our children? I think the need is there. I've already mentioned the data from NCMEC: in 2010, there were about 1 million reports of child sexual abuse online; in 2023, we are talking about 36 million. In 13 years, we went from 1 million to 36 million. This is only the crimes that are being reported. The need for action is there.

I thank the Commission for the proposal. I think it was a very good start. I thank all the colleagues for making this proposal even more ambitious, leading to this unanimous vote from left to right in the LIBE Committee to show this ambition. What I would like to ask is also for the Member States in the Council to step up and match our ambition to make sure that together we can protect children. Protecting children is not a choice. It is perhaps our deepest and most profound responsibility. Let's live up to that responsibility together.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Magnus Brunner, Member of the Commission. 芒聙聯 Madam President, honourable Members, ladies and gentlemen, let me also start by thanking, of course, all of you working on this file, and the LIBE Committee especially for its very strong position, I would say, on the child sexual abuse directive. It shows the commitment, actually, this Parliament has to this very, very important course. And I think to answer your question, Mr Rapporteur, can you be ambitious enough? And you were rightly asking these questions. Of course not. We can never be ambitious enough. There is no more important priority, I would say, than protecting our children.

Let me maybe emphasise five critical elements on that file. First of all, the need to criminalise offences using new technologies. You mentioned that, of course, as well. Like artificially芒聙聭generated child sexual abuse material.

Second, the need to clearly define grooming and sextortion as criminal offences. That is also, obviously, very important. This is especially important given the 12芒聙聭fold increase in grooming reports in the last three years. Grooming involves asking children to send nude pictures or otherwise compromise themselves. These pictures are then often used to extort money. More images or videos or hands-on abuse even.

Thirdly, the Parliament's position, I think, offers a clear definition of consent. Consent should never be assumed when a child freezes out of fear. Non-action is non芒聙聭consent. And this has to be clear, I think. And I'm glad that the Parliament of course agrees on that.

Fourth, I very much welcome that you treat paedophile manuals for what they actually are 芒聙聭 child sexual abuse material, to be precise. And these manuals teach predators how to effectively find and groom children online and offline, how to ensure that they comply and how to hide the crimes.

Fifth, I'm glad that the Parliament agrees that mandatory background checks are needed for anyone working or volunteering also in activities requiring regular contact with children. When we leave our children, be it practising sports or scouting or whatever, we want to be sure that they are in a safe environment.

And to conclude, I really congratulate the Parliament and of course, also the rapporteur, especially along with the shadow rapporteurs, for their outstanding efforts on this file. I really look forward to supporting the Parliament and the Council during the trilogues.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Hel脙漏ne Fritzon, f脙露redragande av FEMM-utskottets yttrande. 芒聙聯 Fru talman! Bakom varje 脙露vergrepp, varje bild, varje klick finns ett barn. Ett barn som har blivit sviket, ett barn vars liv har f脙露r脙陇ndrats f脙露r alltid. Barn, inte minst flickor, har r脙陇tt att v脙陇xa upp fria fr脙楼n v脙楼ld, 脙露vergrepp och exploatering, ocks脙楼 p脙楼 n脙陇tet. F脙露r det som 脙陇r olagligt offline ska sj脙陇lvklart vara olagligt 脙陇ven online.

Som f脙露redragande f脙露r j脙陇mst脙陇lldhetsutskottets yttrande har jag arbetat f脙露r att st脙陇rka barnets r脙陇ttigheter, synligg脙露ra det k脙露nsbaserade v脙楼ldet och se till att vi f脙楼r ett samtycke f脙露r 脙陇ldre barn. Jag vill s脙陇ga tack till v脙楼r f脙露redragande och mina kollegor f脙露r ett v脙陇ldigt gott samarbete. Detta direktiv 脙陇r avg脙露rande f脙露r barns skydd i hela EU. Det 脙陇r v脙楼r skyldighet och v脙楼rt ansvar och nu 脙陇r det dags att g脙楼 fr脙楼n ord till handling, f脙露r v脙楼ra barns skull.

脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Javier Zarzalejos, en nombre del Grupo PPE. 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidenta, se脙卤or comisario, la Directiva sobre la que hoy debatimos aqu脙颅 es un gran logro que merece nuestro apoyo y, desde luego, el reconocimiento del trabajo que ha hecho el ponente, el se脙卤or脗聽Lenaers, as脙颅 como los ponentes alternativos.

No podremos insistir nunca lo suficiente en la gravedad extraordinaria de este problema. Todos los indicadores 芒聙聰el ponente nos ha ofrecido algunos de ellos芒聙聰 muestran que los menores en general son un grupo de riesgo cada vez m脙隆s vulnerable. Y no podemos olvidar que el trato y la protecci脙鲁n que dispensamos a nuestros menores son indicadores de la decencia de nuestras sociedades.

Si tomamos como referencia la Directiva de 2011, vemos que la respuesta ha sido defectuosa, ha sido desigual, ha sido claramente insuficiente, y, por tanto, para que produzcamos resultados efectivos en esta nueva estrategia, necesitamos dos cosas. Por un lado, una actuaci脙鲁n decidida de la Comisi脙鲁n para asegurar la transposici脙鲁n adecuada en tiempo y forma de las disposiciones de la Directiva al Derecho nacional 芒聙聰esto hasta ahora no ha ocurrido y creo que es un compromiso fundamental que la Comisi脙鲁n tiene que asumir芒聙聰. Y, en segundo lugar, completar esta Directiva, como se dice en la exposici脙鲁n de motivos, con un marco permanente 芒聙聰un Reglamento芒聙聰 para la lucha y la prevenci脙鲁n del material de abuso sexual de menores en l脙颅nea.

Como se dice en la exposici脙鲁n de motivos, esta Directiva y la propuesta de Reglamento, sobre la cual todav脙颅a los Estados miembros no han acordado una posici脙鲁n negociadora, se necesitan mutuamente y, por tanto, son dos elementos cruciales si queremos que nuestra estrategia de protecci脙鲁n de los menores triunfe.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Marina Kaljurand, on behalf of the S&D Group. 芒聙聯 Madam President, Commissioner, missing Council, dear colleagues, child sexual abuse is an extremely cruel crime that leaves the victim to deal with decades of trauma. In order to protect our children, we need to make sure that there is no impunity for these crimes, and that victims get maximum help and support.

Today, I have three messages. First, to the victims and survivors of child sexual abuse: we met you, we listened to your stories and we heard you.

We need to ensure that the victim gets all the support needed as fast and efficiently as possible, even if the crime has not been formally reported. It is during the time of the most intense trauma that victims need most support, and they should not be denied it because they were not ready to go to the police.

I would like to underline also the importance of helplines and online chats as anonymous channels, and the reporting obligation that can be a lifeline for victims.

Second, to the Council: on average, a victim will report a crime of abuse that happened in childhood when they are over 50 years old. Yes, 50. It can take even longer.

To ensure no impunity, we need to abolish statutes of limitations. It is crucial to report and adjudicate these crimes even if time has passed. I urge the Council and Member States to rise above the 27 unique jurisdictions and give our children fair and equal protection across the EU and in all Member States.

Finally, to my colleagues in this House: I would like to recognise the work of the rapporteur and shadow rapporteurs. Negotiations were tough, but today I can say that the compromise that we reached is ambitious and strong.脗聽So I urge you to vote for the unanimous report. Our negotiators need a strong and ambitious mandate. It's our duty.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Susanna Ceccardi, a nome del gruppo PfE. 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, se non siamo capaci di proteggere i nostri figli, allora falliamo nel nostro compito pi脙鹿 sacro. I minori sono troppo spesso vittime di crimini orrendi: sfruttamento sessuale, pedopornografia, tratta internazionale. Dietro questi reati ci sono reti organizzate, criminali senza scrupoli, mercanti di vite umane. Contro questi mostri servono pene severissime, controlli capillari, collaborazione europea e tolleranza zero. Su questo non esiste destra e sinistra. Esiste solo il dovere di difendere i pi脙鹿 indifesi senza esitazioni.

Ma la minaccia ai nostri bambini non viene solo dai pedocriminali, viene anche da chi vuole confondere i loro corpi e le loro menti fin dalla pi脙鹿 tenera et脙聽. S脙卢, mi riferisco all'indottrinamento gender, alla propaganda LGBT e ai tentativi di normalizzare transizioni di genere su minori senza maturit脙聽 n脙漏 consapevolezza.

I bambini devono essere protetti nella loro innocenza, non esposti a esperimenti ideologici che cercano di cancellarne l'identit脙聽 biologica, la famiglia, la madre e il padre. I nostri figli, i nostri nipoti non sono cavie sociali, sono il nostro futuro e la nostra speranza. 脙聢 nostro dovere difenderli tanto dai criminali quanto da chi vorrebbe sessualizzarli, commettendo un'altra terribile forma di abuso.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Assita Kanko, namens de ECR-Fractie. 芒聙聯 Voorzitter, vandaag zetten wij een belangrijke stap in de strijd tegen een van de meest gruwelijke vormen van misdaad: het seksueel misbruik van kinderen. Elke dag dat wij aarzelen, blijven kinderen lijden.

Deze richtlijn gaat niet over papieren compromissen of politieke kleuren. Ze gaat over onze kinderen, over hun stem, over het feit dat misbruik vandaag niet alleen achter gesloten deuren gebeurt, maar in de pixelhitte van livestreams, deepfakes en onlinenetwerken die sneller groeien dan ons wetboek kan volgen. Dus neen, we hebben geen tijd meer voor semantiek of symbolen. Wat we nodig hebben, is daadkracht.

Als ECR-schaduwrapporteur ben ik trots op onze bijdrage aan deze tekst, en ik dank rapporteur Lenaers, alle collega's en onze medewerkers voor de constructieve samenwerking. Wat vandaag op tafel ligt, is geen technische aanpassing van een richtlijn. Het is een noodzakelijke koerswijziging, want het systeem zoals het nu is, faalt en laat onze kinderen in de steek. Daders verschuilen zich achter verouderde wetgeving en slachtoffers blijven achter met trauma's, zonder erkenning of recht. Daarom moet de verjaringstermijn verlengd worden, zodat slachtoffers de tijd krijgen om te spreken wanneer zij daartoe klaar zijn, niet wanneer de klok het gebiedt.

Het internet moet veiliger worden, internationale samenwerking moet beter worden, straffen zwaarder. Slachtoffers moeten kunnen rekenen op structurele steun, psychologisch, juridisch, menselijk. Zij dragen de littekens een leven lang en hebben recht op hulp, niet op schaamte.

De tekst die we vandaag voorleggen, is niet perfect. Er zijn bepalingen waarover we verdeeld zijn, maar laat ons niet vergeten waarom we hier zijn: om kinderen te beschermen. Ik roep dus op om het mandaat van het Parlement goed te keuren, om recht te doen aan slachtoffers en om te tonen dat dit Parlement, ongeacht partijpolitieke grenzen of ideologie, eensgezind kan staan voor de meest fundamentele waarden: de veiligheid en waardigheid van elk kind.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Veronika Cifrov脙隆 Ostriho脜聢ov脙隆, za skupinu Renew. 芒聙聯 V脙隆脜戮en脙隆 pani predsedaj脙潞ca, dnes je de脜聢, kedy m脙隆me dobr脙潞 spr脙隆vu, preto脜戮e pos脙潞vame ochranu det脙颅 pred sexu脙隆lnym n脙隆sil脙颅m o krok 脛聫alej, teda tu aspo脜聢 v parlamente. Tresty pre pred脙隆torov bud脙潞 pr脙颅snej脜隆ie a bud脙潞 presnej脜隆ie. Ako sme po脛聧uli, ru脜隆脙颅me aj preml脛聧aciu lehotu pre trestn脙漏 脛聧iny sexu脙隆lneho zneu脜戮脙颅vania det脙颅. Vieme toti脜戮, 脜戮e a脜戮 40 % pre脜戮iv脜隆脙颅ch si t脙潞to traumu vybav脙颅 a脜戮 po rokoch a v脙陇脛聧脜隆ina z nich ju dok脙隆脜戮e spracova脜楼 a脜戮 v dospelosti 芒聙聯脗聽脛聧asto po p脙陇脜楼desiatke. Ak si nie脛聧o zasl脙潞脜戮i do脜戮ivotn脙漏 pr脙隆vo na spravodlivos脜楼, tak je to pr脙隆ve zneu脜戮itie v detstve. Viac liniek pomoci, dostupnej脜隆ia zdravotn脙隆 starostlivos脜楼 aj rizik脙隆 umelej inteligencie, to v脜隆etko je v t脙陆chto nov脙陆ch pravidl脙隆ch. A som rada, 脜戮e som sa na ich tvorbe spolupodie脛戮ala aj ja, preto脜戮e autenticky ver脙颅m, 脜戮e to je 脙潞loha n脙隆s v politike: kona脜楼 a hovori脜楼 v prospech t脙陆ch najzranite脛戮nej脜隆脙颅ch, v prospech t脙陆ch, ktor脙颅 za seba hovori脜楼 nechc脙潞 alebo nem脙麓脜戮u. Ver脙颅m, 脜戮e pri tejto legislat脙颅ve sa to v parlamente podarilo. Ver脙颅m, 脜戮e si to uvedomuje aj Komisia a d脙潞fam, 脜戮e si to uvedomuje aj dnes ch脙陆baj脙潞ca Rada. Preto脜戮e ak v tom nebudeme spolu, tak deti sklameme. A to si nem脙麓脜戮eme nikto z n脙隆s dovoli脜楼.

脗聽脗聽

脗聽脗聽Saskia Bricmont, au nom du groupe Verts/ALE. 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, chers coll脙篓gues, un enfant sur cinq est victime de violence ou d'exploitation sexuelle au cours de sa vie dans l'Union europ脙漏enne, ce sont quatre 脙聽 cinq enfants dans chaque classe d'脙漏cole, un 脙聽 deux enfants dans chaque 脙漏quipe de foot. Les violences sexuelles sur les enfants sont une v脙漏ritable pand脙漏mie silencieuse qui ne dit pas son nom et qui se poursuit en ligne, o脙鹿 nos enfants passent de plus en plus de temps.

Le texte que nous proposons aujourd'hui 脙聽 vos voix vise 脙聽 脙陋tre 脙聽 la hauteur de ce moment historique. Parce que, non, l'impunit脙漏 n'est plus une option pour ces crimes qui marquent des vies enti脙篓res. Ce texte porte des changements notoires: une justice qui est adapt脙漏e aux enfants suivant le mod脙篓le Barnahus, qui est 脙聽 l'脙漏coute des enfants; une claire d脙漏finition du consentement; la lev脙漏e de l'impunit脙漏 pour les crimes les plus graves; l'harmonisation des crimes et des sanctions; la reconnaissance de nouvelles infractions avec des r脙漏ponses p脙漏nales plus compl脙篓tes qui incluent des m脙漏canismes de pr脙漏vention au sein de tous les espaces qui accueillent des enfants, mais aussi aupr脙篓s des auteurs potentiels; et, enfin, l'interdiction de ces manuels p脙漏dopornographiques, v脙漏ritables guides pour abuser d'enfants.

Je tiens 脙聽 f脙漏liciter le travail du rapporteur et de mes coll脙篓gues rapporteurs fictifs dans ce dossier. Nous avons adopt脙漏 ce texte 脙聽 l'unanimit脙漏 au sein de la commission脗聽LIBE. J'attends de notre part, chers coll脙篓gues, que nous l'adoption en s脙漏ance pl脙漏ni脙篓re 脙漏galement 脙聽 l'unanimit脙漏 et que le message soit univoque 脙聽 l'脙漏gard de nos gouvernements, du Conseil, pour qu'ensemble nous avancions enfin dans une v脙漏ritable lutte et un v脙漏ritable soutien de tous les enfants victimes d'abus et d'exploitation sexuelle.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Irene Montero, en nombre del Grupo The Left. 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidenta, se脙卤or comisario, se脙卤or脙颅as, uno de cada cinco ni脙卤os y ni脙卤as en Europa es v脙颅ctima de violencia sexual y, por eso, obviamente celebramos que esta Directiva mejore la persecuci脙鲁n de la violencia sexual contra la infancia, que es una de las m脙隆s grav脙颅simas y generalizadas violaciones de derechos humanos, pero quiero destacar la gran deuda pendiente que tiene esta Directiva con las madres protectoras y con sus hijos e hijas. Son mujeres que se est脙隆n defendiendo a s脙颅 mismas y a sus hijos e hijas de la violencia machista de sus maltratadores. Y, demasiadas veces, la justicia, en lugar de protegerles, condena a las madres y pone en riesgo los derechos de los ni脙卤os y ni脙卤as, oblig脙隆ndoles a convivir con sus padres maltratadores que 芒聙聰en no pocas ocasiones, como sabe芒聙聰, aprovechan el r脙漏gimen de visitas o la convivencia para ejercer violencia o incluso para asesinar a esos ni脙卤os y ni脙卤as y dar donde m脙隆s duele a las madres.

Yo creo, se脙卤or comisario, que Europa no puede seguir mirando para otro lado, porque para no lamentar m脙隆s asesinatos hay que defender a las madres protectoras y a sus hijos e hijas cuando est脙隆n vivos. Y hay que prohibir el falso s脙颅ndrome de alienaci脙鲁n parental y hay que prohibir el r脙漏gimen de visitas ante el m脙隆s m脙颅nimo indicio de maltrato y asegurar tambi脙漏n reparaci脙鲁n y reconocimiento para esas mujeres y para esas infancias.

En todo caso, celebramos esta Directiva y nos queremos vivas.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Mary Khan, im Namen der ESN-Fraktion. 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin! Vielen Dank, Herr Berichterstatter! Auch meine Fraktion hat diesem Bericht zugestimmt. Doch f脙录r uns pers脙露nlich liegt das Problem viel tiefer, auch gerade bei uns in Deutschland, in der Gesellschaft, denn es gibt dort Doktorspiele in Kinderg脙陇rten, Programme wie Original Play in Berlin, bei denen fremde M脙陇nner eingeladen werden, um mit Kindern sozusagen zu kuscheln, Jugendliche, die glauben, im falschen K脙露rper zu leben, und sich irreversiblen Eingriffen unterziehen. All das geschieht auch unter dem Deckmantel von Toleranz, Vielfalt und Fortschritt, doch lassen Sie mich klarstellen: Das ist kein Fortschritt, das ist ein Angriff auf die Unschuld unserer Kinder und die Werte, die unsere Gesellschaft zusammenhalten.

Und in vielen L脙陇ndern Europas und vor allem in Deutschland werden Kinder heute mit sexualisierten Inhalten 脙录berflutet, lange bevor sie 脙录berhaupt die Reife besitzen, diese zu verstehen. Schulpropaganda, sogenannte Aufkl脙陇rungsbrosch脙录ren und Workshops linker NGOs, die unter dem Vorwand von Aufkl脙陇rung und Diversit脙陇t Minderj脙陇hrige umerziehen wollen: Sie pervertieren aber die nat脙录rliche Entwicklung unserer Kinder und verwischen vor allem die Grenzen der Normalit脙陇t. Und all das tr脙陇gt vor allem bei uns in Deutschland die CDU mit.

Aber Missbrauch beginnt vor allem ganz weit vor Misshandlung und auch Pornografie im Internet. Er beginnt dort, wo ihre Vorfeldorganisationen und Parteifreunde die sexuelle Umerziehung unserer Kinder institutionalisieren wollen und propagieren. Wir d脙录rfen nicht zulassen, dass unsere Kinder Opfer kranker Ideologien werden. Eine Welt ohne Gott, ohne Familie, ohne Werte脗聽芒聙聯 in dieser Welt ist alles erlaubt, und diese Welt lehnen wir strikt ab. Kinder brauchen Schutz, Liebe und Grenzen und keine Fr脙录hsexualisierung.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Micha脜聜 Wawrykiewicz (PPE). 芒聙聯 Madam President, Commissioner, colleagues, we are discussing today the most important topic of all, and I would like to thank Mr Lenaers and all of the others that worked on that file for the great job. Protecting children from sexual abuse, especially online, is our core duty, and I believe no one in this House has any doubts about that.

With over 32 million reports in 2022, stronger EU-wide protection is urgently needed. The DSA sets a framework, but enforcement is still too weak. We need real accountability from platforms and better coordination across all of the 27 Member States. This legislation brings essential updates, clear definitions, longer limitation periods, and stronger victim support. This is the great advantage of these documents. Parliament must also address online anonymity and poor age controls by promoting effective age verification and identification to protect children.

And finally, the huge topic of using artificial intelligence was raised by the rapporteur at the beginning of this debate. This is probably our biggest challenge in protecting children against sexual abuse.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Alex Agius Saliba (S&D). 芒聙聯 Sinjura President, l-ewwel nett messa脛隆脛隆 lill-kollegi tal-lemin estrem: l-abbu脜录 fuq it-tfal ma jsirx abba脜录i tal-orjentazzjoni sesswali, l-abbu脜录 tat-tfal, sfortunatament, issir minn persuni straight u anke persuni ta' orjentazzjonijiet sesswali differenti. Ji脛隆ifieri ejja ma nippruvawx, nippruvawx nitfg脛搂u dell ikrah fuq parti minorit脙聽 importanti fis-so脛聥jet脙聽 tag脛搂na.

Jiena b脛搂ala missier, hija wa脛搂da mill-iktar affarijiet li tinkwetani, li g脛搂ada pitg脛搂ada, tista' nara lil binti ti脛隆i abbu脜录ata f'dinja li fl-a脛搂脛搂ar mill-a脛搂脛搂ar it-tfal tag脛搂na j脛搂ossuhom komdi li jintera脛隆ixxu fiha. Imma sfortunatament, l-abbu脜录i sesswali fuq ba脜录i online dejjem qeg脛搂din ji脜录diedu. Sal-biera脛搂 stess, kont affa脛聥脛聥jat b'ka脜录 ta' tfajla ta' 11-il sena li 脛隆iet mhedda b'materjal pornografiku fuqha, li n脛搂oloq bl-intelli脛隆enza artifi脛聥jali u allura llum ir-responsabilitajiet fuqna anke abba脜录i tal-evoluzzjoni tat-teknolo脛隆ija huma ferm u ferm akbar minna. U na脛搂seb li din id-direttiva trid titfa' aktar responsabilit脙聽 fuq il-Big Tech sabiex ikunu responsabbli wkoll tal-materjal li ji脛隆i 脛隆脛隆enerat u ppromovut fuq il-pjattaformi tag脛搂hom.

Huwa importanti, huwa vitali li f'dawn il-ka脜录ijiet li m'g脛搂andhom l-ebda tip ta' fruntiera, huwa importanti li jkollna, g脛搂aldaqstant aktar koordinazzjoni u allura huwa vitali li nkomplu g脛搂addejjin b'din il-脛搂idma fuq din id-direttiva u naraw li b脛搂ala Parlament Ewropew nitkellmu lkoll b'vu脛聥i wa脛搂da.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Anders Vistisen (PfE). 芒聙聯 Madam President, let me be clear: this legislation is not only about fighting abuse, it's about harmonising criminal law and creating a brand-new EU agency. And we know exactly how this ends: where the EU has been given more power, it turns into a disaster. Look at anything from the Common Agricultural Policy to fisheries, or the economic disaster called the eurozone. More centralisation doesn't solve problems, it creates them. This is not only about helping children, this is a federalist power grab, an excuse to expand Brussels bureaucracy at the expense of national democratic control.

But let me be clear: if it was up to me, sexual offences against children would lead to medical castration. That's a real deterrent, that's real justice. But oftentimes in Brussels, this is considered barbaric and the criminal must be understood and the victim is expected to quietly move on. We don't need another EU centre. We need local action, national laws and strong borders because child protection against child abuse begins at home, not in Brussels.

(The speaker agreed to take a blue-card question)

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Jeroen Lenaers (PPE), blue-card question. 芒聙聯 Thank you, Mr Vistisen. First of all, a small correction: this legislation does not create a new centre. The centre is already there through the regulation, which is still under negotiation.

But regardless of that, the centre is there to make research, to help victims, to have reporting. What power does this centre have in your mind that would interfere with the Member States' own responsibility to protect children? Because simply there is none.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Anders Vistisen (PfE), blue-card answer. 芒聙聯 All centralisation, harmonisation of powers to the European Union creates infringement against the national Member States, and Denmark has an opt-out on this area, and I'm very happy to have that, exactly because the Danish police are at the forefront of fighting against child abuse and sexual exploitation of children.

It is quite funny that Denmark, being the only EU Member State except Ireland who has this opt-out, has been asked by Europol to head several cases against child abuse.

So, if Member States were so bad at this, why are you asking for our help instead of solving it in your centralised powerhouses? That is my question. I can see that Member States work, national control works and national police work, and I believe in them.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Paolo Inselvini (ECR). 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, scandalizzare, violare, violentare i pi脙鹿 piccoli e innocenti rappresenta uno dei crimini peggiori che si possano solo immaginare. Dobbiamo indignarci e schifarci di fronte agli abusi nei confronti dei minori e con fermezza dobbiamo a tutti i costi fare giustizia.

I predatori sfruttano le nuove tecnologie, si nascondono nell'ombra e lasciano ferite indelebili nelle vite dei pi脙鹿 piccoli.脗聽Pene pi脙鹿 severe, strumenti pi脙鹿 efficaci sono fondamentali, ma non basta. Dobbiamo prevenire tutto questo. Dobbiamo creare una societ脙聽 nella quale non siano pi脙鹿 accettate le parole di chi sostiene che la pedofilia sia solo un altro orientamento sessuale. Dobbiamo renderci conto che l'ipersessualizzazione dei bambini e dei ragazzi, il libero accesso alla pornografia, che diventa sempre pi脙鹿 spesso una dipendenza e una patologia, la propagazione dell'ideologia del godimento a tutti i costi e dell'ideologia脗聽gender non ci aiutano a combattere questa piaga, anzi la propagano.

I bambini devono essere lasciati stare nella loro purezza e nella loro innocenza. Ed 脙篓 nostro compito primario stare dalla parte dei bambini, a tutti i costi.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Laurence Farreng (Renew). 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, Monsieur le Commissaire, en France, pr脙篓s de 10脗聽% des enfants sont victimes d'abus sexuels et les petites filles le sont deux fois plus que les gar脙搂ons. En France, c'est toutes les trois minutes qu'un enfant est victime de viol, d'inceste ou d'abus sexuels.

Cette mise 脙聽 jour de la directive de脗聽2011 est donc un grand progr脙篓s parce qu'elle actualise et unifie nos d脙漏finitions des infractions li脙漏es aux abus sexuels sur enfants et c'est un grand progr脙篓s, mais il faut que le combat continue pour prot脙漏ger nos enfants, et en ligne tout particuli脙篓rement.

Oui, le web et les r脙漏seaux sociaux sont maintenant r脙漏gul脙漏s par la l脙漏gislation sur les services num脙漏riques. Pourtant, le pire continue 脙聽 se produire et c'est pourquoi je voudrais plaider pour des avanc脙漏es encore nouvelles, notamment sur des lignes fortes donn脙漏es par la Commission en mati脙篓re de protection des mineurs et de v脙漏rification de l'脙垄ge, avec l'脙漏tablissement d'une majorit脙漏 num脙漏rique 脙聽 quinze ans partout dans l'Union europ脙漏enne. Et, surtout, avancer et conclure ce dossier de lutte contre les abus sexuels en ligne, pour lequel les n脙漏gociations s'脙漏ternisent et qui est malheureusement encore bloqu脙漏 au niveau des conseils. Pendant ce temps, les abus sur enfants continuent.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Alice Kuhnke (Verts/ALE). 芒聙聯 Fru talman! Barn ska f脙楼 vara barn, men i EU 脙陇r det varje 脙楼r fler 脙陇n 1 miljon barn som ocks脙楼 tvingas att vara n脙楼got annat: brottsoffer, m脙楼ls脙陇gande, 脙露verlevare. Det 脙陇r 1 miljon hj脙陇rtekrossande misslyckanden f脙露r samh脙陇llet, 1 miljon liv som alltid f脙露r脙陇ndras, 1 miljon livsl脙楼nga trauman.

I Sverige finns ett starkare skydd f脙露r barn mot 脙露vergrepp 脙陇n i m脙楼nga andra EU-l脙陇nder, men det 脙陇r inte tillr脙陇ckligt. V脙陇gen 脙陇r l脙楼ng till ett samh脙陇lle som inte sviker, ett samh脙陇lle d脙陇r lagen ovillkorligt st脙楼r p脙楼 barnens sida.

Med det f脙露rslag som nu ligger p脙楼 bordet f脙楼r barn och unga i hela EU ett starkare skydd mot 脙露vergrepp och exploatering, vilket 脙陇r v脙楼r f脙露rbannade skyldighet som vuxna och politiker att se till blir verklighet.

脗聽脗聽Lukas Sieper (NI). 芒聙聯 Madam President, I am basing my point of order 芒聙聯 as so often before 芒聙聯 on Rule脗聽10(4) of the Rules of Procedure of the European Parliament prohibiting hate speech.

In this debate, in the speeches of our colleagues Susanna Ceccardi, Mary Khan or even Zsuzsanna Borvend脙漏g, we have seen rhetoric that automatically puts the mere existence or the knowledge of people of the LGBTQ+ community as a danger to children.

We can, of course, have a debate about the point in the life of a child where it should get knowledge about sexuality, but phrasing the mere existence of a group as a danger to children 芒聙聯 this is hate speech.

Madam Vice-President, we have seen this in this Parliament over and over again, and I think there was a reason why Rule脗聽10(4)脗聽explicitly mentions hate speech. So I ask the Bureau to step up against this, because I'm sick of hearing this talking point 芒聙聯 that so clearly goes against our values 芒聙聯 over and over again.

Nie mo脜录emy ju脜录 d脜聜u脜录ej udawa脛聡, 脜录e walka z t脛聟 przemoc脛聟 to zadanie wy脜聜脛聟cznie dla organ脙鲁w 脜聸cigania. Potrzebujemy pe脜聜nej mobilizacji ca脜聜ego spo脜聜ecze脜聞stwa. Jednolite standardy 脜聸cigania i nieuchronno脜聸脛聡 kary musz脛聟 sta脛聡 si脛聶 europejsk脛聟 norm脛聟, a nie wyj脛聟tkiem.

脗聽脗聽Margarita de la Pisa Carri脙鲁n (PfE). 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidente, se脙卤or comisario, se脙卤or脙颅as, uno de cada cinco ni脙卤os sufre abuso sexual en Europa. A los adultos de hoy nos debe avergonzar. Les estamos fallando, dej脙隆ndolos desprotegidos ante situaciones violentas que les dejar脙隆n secuelas f脙颅sicas, psicol脙鲁gicas y sociales que los marcar脙隆n toda la vida.

No podemos olvidarnos de la agresi脙鲁n que supone la exposici脙鲁n de los menores a la pornograf脙颅a. Lo que un ni脙卤o ve, lo vive como una experiencia real, por lo que el contenido pornogr脙隆fico act脙潞a como una violaci脙鲁n ps脙颅quica, rompe su inocencia y afecta as脙颅 a su desarrollo cognitivo y afectivo. Este peligro es accesible y los persigue en l脙颅nea, los engancha cuando todav脙颅a no tienen madurez, lo que genera una adicci脙鲁n patol脙鲁gica que ya es una emergencia de salud p脙潞blica y tambi脙漏n un veneno social, pues, como los ni脙卤os aprenden imitando, repetir脙隆n el modelo que vean y tender脙隆n as脙颅 a hipersexualizar sus relaciones, cosificando a las personas, especialmente a las mujeres. Devolver脙隆n la agresividad que han visto en pantalla.

Desgraciadamente, cada clic supone ingresos. El 12脗聽% de las visitas de la pornograf脙颅a son de menores. Debemos perseguir a quienes se lucran a costa de la dignidad y la salud de nuestros ni脙卤os.

脗聽脗聽Georgiana Teodorescu (ECR). 芒聙聯 Doamn脛聝 pre脠聶edint脛聝, ca mam脛聝, cred c脛聝 nimic nu este mai important dec脙垄t siguran脠聸a copiilor 脠聶i dezvoltarea lor armonioas脛聝, lipsit脛聝 de griji 脠聶i de pericole. A脠聶adar, solicit toleran脠聸脛聝 zero pentru materialele care 脙庐ncurajeaz脛聝 脙庐n orice fel abuzul sexual 脠聶i exploatarea sexual脛聝 a copiilor. Ca membru LIBE, am propus amendamente prin care am majorat limitele de pedeaps脛聝 pentru astfel de infrac脠聸iuni 脠聶i am propus sanc脠聸ionarea penal脛聝 a tuturor celor care, folosindu-se de inteligen脠聸a artificial脛聝 sau de orice mijloace informatice, creeaz脛聝 sau distribuie desene animate sau orice alt tip de materiale video implic脙垄nd victime copii.

Aceste crea脠聸ii ale unei imagina脠聸ii bolnave 脠聶i ale unui comportament deviant reprezint脛聝 脙庐ndemnuri la abuz, iar studiile arat脛聝 c脛聝 accesul la ele cre脠聶te riscul unor viitoare agresiuni 脙庐nf脛聝ptuite asupra minorilor 脙庐n lumea real脛聝.

S脛聝 plec脛聝m de aici cu un mesaj inconfundabil. Nu vom tolera pe nimeni care permite sau comite exploatarea 脠聶i abuzul sexual al copiilor. Nu vom permite nim脛聝nui s脛聝 mu脠聶amalizeze aceste crime. Copiii no脠聶tri sunt motivul 脠聶i datoria noastr脛聝 pentru care noi suntem aici, 脙庐n acest Parlament.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Moritz K脙露rner (Renew). 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin, liebe Kolleginnen und Kollegen! Was ist das f脙录r ein schreckliches Verbrechen des Kindesmissbrauchs? Was machen wir mit Kindern dort? Was passiert dort? Wie viel millionenfach passiert es in Europa, und zwar online, aber auch immer noch im engen Familienkreis, in Sportvereinen, 脙录berall? Dagegen versuchen wir jetzt hier eine Richtlinie vorzulegen, um st脙陇rker tats脙陇chlich etwas zu tun.

Was macht die Rechte hier im Parlament? Sie nutzt ihre gesamte Redezeit, gerade von der AfD, um 脙录ber angebliche Fr脙录hsexualisierung und LGBT zu reden; so wichtig ist ihnen offenbar das Thema. Es ist ihnen offenbar so wichtig, dass sie null dazu sagen, dass wir hier regeln, wie wir Opfer besser sch脙录tzen; dass sie null dazu sagen, dass wir in Zukunft in ganz Europa besser daf脙录r sorgen wollen, dass Menschen, die f脙录r Kinder zus脙陇tzlich berufst脙陇tig sind脗聽芒聙聯 Lehrer, in Vereinen, sonstwo脗聽芒聙聯, st脙陇rker 脙录berpr脙录ft werden. Das ist ihnen alles nicht wichtig. Es geht ihnen darum, bei diesem Thema wieder ihren Hass zu s脙陇hen. Tun Sie mal Ihre Arbeit, Kinder tats脙陇chlich konkret zu sch脙录tzen!

Die EU芒聙聭Kommission bitte ich, wenn sie jetzt vorangeht, wenn diese Richtlinie endlich Gesetz wird, dass sie dann nicht wie die letzte Richtlinie 2011 lange von den Mitgliedstaaten nicht umgesetzt wird. Die EU芒聙聭Kommission musste gegen sieben Mitgliedstaaten ein Vertragsverletzungsverfahren einleiten. Was soll das eigentlich? Wir m脙录ssen doch endlich Kinder gemeinsam sch脙录tzen, meine Damen und Herren!

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Nicolae 脠聵tef脛聝nu脠聸脛聝 (Verts/ALE). 芒聙聯 Doamn脛聝 pre脠聶edint脛聝, anul trecut, 脙庐n Rom脙垄nia au fost raportate 20脗聽000 de cazuri de abuz 脠聶i de exploatare a copiilor 脠聶i 4脗聽000 de violuri, de copii viola脠聸i. Iar abuzul nu vine doar din cas脛聝 sau din 脙庐mprejurime, vine 脠聶i din online.

Exist脛聝 site-uri cum este onanisti.ro care incit脛聝 astfel de abuzuri, iar c脙垄nd copiii, fetele se duc s脛聝 cear脛聝 ajutor, li se spune c脛聝 este vina lor. Dac脛聝 脙庐n urma abuzului fetele r脛聝m脙垄n 脙庐ns脛聝rcinate, a脠聶a cum s-a 脙庐nt脙垄mplat anul trecut cu peste 600 de fete sub 15 ani, cum s脛聝-脠聶i continue ele via脠聸a cu un copil la acea v脙垄rst脛聝 脠聶i cu g脙垄ndul constant al omului care le-a violat deasupra lor, cu un g脙垄nd oribil.

脠聵i c脙垄nd ne g脙垄ndim c脛聝 sunt copii de 6 ani c脛聝rora li se 脙庐nt脙垄mpl脛聝 a脠聶a ceva. 脠聵i eu am un copil de 5 ani 脠聶i nu pot s脛聝-mi imaginez o lume 脙庐n care nu 脙庐i protej脛聝m de aceste abuzuri. Ce viitor po脠聸i s脛聝 ai dac脛聝 te treze脠聶ti noaptea speriat脛聝, dac脛聝 nu ai 脙庐nv脛聝脠聸at c脛聝 ai dreptul la protec脠聸ie, la ordin de protec脠聸ie?

A脠聶a c脛聝 consider c脛聝 directiva european脛聝 trebuie s脛聝 includ脛聝 脠聶i obliga脠聸ia la educa脠聸ie sexual脛聝, la drept real la avort, nu la medici care se ascund 脙庐n spatele unor convingeri personale desuete. Nu mai putem 脙庐nchide ochii.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Anja Arndt (ESN). 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin! In der EU wird jede Sekunde ein Bild oder ein Video von sexuellem Kindesmissbrauch online ver脙露ffentlicht. Jede einzelne Aufnahme bedeutet f脙录r eines unserer Kinder lebenslange Belastung, Verletzung und oft ein Trauma. Es ist richtig, jetzt auch KI芒聙聭generierte Missbrauchsbilder und 芒聙聭videos und die Kontaktanbahnung zu Kindern 脙录ber das Internet gesetzlich zu erfassen und unter Strafe zu stellen. Das unterst脙录tzen wir als ESN ausdr脙录cklich. Aber was die Kommission in diesem Zusammenhang dar脙录ber hinaus plant, geht zu weit. Private Nachrichten, Chats, sogar die verschl脙录sselte Kommunikation soll von allen B脙录rgern automatisch durchsucht werden.

Unser Grundrecht auf Datenschutz darf nicht beschnitten werden. Der Schutz unserer Kinder darf niemals der Vorwand f脙录r einen EU芒聙聭脙聹berwachungsstaat sein. Die Milliarden Euro f脙录r die geplante 脙聹berwachung sollten, nein, sie m脙录ssen in den Mitgliedstaaten bleiben und in die Pr脙陇vention, den Schutz und die Hilfe von missbrauchten Kindern flie脙聼en. Deutschland braucht die AfD, und die Europ脙陇ische Union braucht die ESN.

(Die Rednerin lehnt eine Frage nach dem Verfahren der 芒聙聻blauen Karte芒聙聹 von Moritz K脙露rner ab.)

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Malika Sorel (PfE). 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, chers coll脙篓gues, Monsieur le Commissaire, cette directive repr脙漏sente un progr脙篓s significatif, elle doit 脙陋tre salu脙漏e. Pour prot脙漏ger les enfants, nous devrons toutefois faire davantage.

Premi脙篓rement, les services fournis par les plateformes, dont les diaboliques algorithmes sont des armes qui pi脙篓gent les enfants: ils sont assimilables 脙聽 des produits et doivent 脙陋tre qualifi脙漏s comme tels. Nous pourrons alors mobiliser notre arsenal juridique pour les produits d脙漏fectueux ou dangereux.

Deuxi脙篓mement, d脙篓s leur conception, les t脙漏l脙漏phones vendus 脙聽 des enfants jusqu'脙聽 un certain 脙垄ge脗聽芒聙聯 quinze ans semble raisonnable脗聽芒聙聯 devront 脙陋tre brid脙漏s. Ainsi, ils ne pourront pas acc脙漏der 脙聽 certains sites ou applications.

Enfin, d脙篓s lors qu'il s'agit d'enfants, nous devons bannir toute notion de consentement.

Chers coll脙篓gues, dans脗聽Le Petit Prince, Saint-Exup脙漏ry nous rappelle que toutes les grandes personnes ont d'abord 脙漏t脙漏 des enfants, mais peu d'entre elles s'en souviennent. Faire qu'elles s'en souviennent est le d脙漏fi 脙聽 relever afin que l'innocence des enfants soit pr脙漏serv脙漏e.

脗聽脗聽Juan Fernando L脙鲁pez Aguilar (S&D). 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidenta, comisario Brunner, el art脙颅culo 24 de la Carta de los Derechos Fundamentales de la Uni脙鲁n Europea obliga a la Uni脙鲁n Europea a proteger a los menores y su inter脙漏s superior con todos los instrumentos a su alcance, tambi脙漏n por medio del Derecho penal contra delitos grav脙颅simos, como son el abuso sexual en la red, la pornograf脙颅a infantil y el reclutamiento de menores para objetivos de explotaci脙鲁n sexual, incluso mediante t脙漏cnicas de inteligencia artificial. Pero es que, adem脙隆s, este Parlamento Europeo es el 脙潞nico legislador capaz de imponer obligaciones a los grandes servidores en la red y su modelo de negocio con algoritmos adictivos cuando producen delitos tan graves y tan ofensivos.

Por eso, esta Directiva penal es tan importante, porque establece definiciones penales claras, establece penas severas ante delitos muy graves y, sobre todo, por su imprescriptibilidad 芒聙聰que no puedan prescribir esos delitos芒聙聰, adem脙隆s de t脙漏cnicas de prevenci脙鲁n como son l脙颅neas telef脙鲁nicas de apoyo y protecci脙鲁n a las v脙颅ctimas y a los testigos y mecanismos eficaces de denuncia, pero lo m脙隆s importante es que la Comisi脙鲁n de Libertades Civiles, Justicia y Asuntos de Interior ha hecho un trabajo enorme para conseguir un apoyo pr脙隆cticamente un脙隆nime a una Directiva penal que lo merece y, por tanto, un mandato de este Parlamento Europeo para negociar en esa fase final en la que debe ser desbloqueada esta legislaci脙鲁n penal que tiene que ver la luz del d脙颅a en el Consejo.

脗聽脗聽Mathilde Androu脙芦t (PfE). 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, chaque groupement humain s'脙漏l脙篓ve moralement quand il organise politiquement la protection des plus petits et des plus faibles. L'Europe peut donc s'enorgueillir aujourd'hui d'avoir 脜聯uvr脙漏 脙聽 sa grandeur en s'occupant de ses petits, de ses enfants, et notamment de ceux qui ont eu le malheur de vivre la pr脙漏dation sexuelle.

Le fait d'脙漏quiper nos forces de police et nos cours de justice, qui doivent prendre soin des victimes et affronter pour elles leurs bourreaux, est une chose heureuse. On aurait pu leur faciliter une partie de la t脙垄che en ajoutant dans le rapport l'expulsion automatique des p脙漏dophiles 脙漏trangers.

On peut toutefois regretter ici le passage oblig脙漏 par les clich脙漏s id脙漏ologiques du moment. Je pense 脙聽 la possibilit脙漏 l脙漏gale d'user du l脙漏gitime blocage des fichiers p脙漏dopornographiques pour censurer d'autres pans de l'Internet, mais je songe surtout 脙聽 l'ajout de la notion de consentement. De quel consentement sexuel parle-t-on quand on parle de mineurs? D脙漏j脙聽 compliqu脙漏 juridiquement pour un majeur, pourquoi l'appliquer 脙聽 des enfants?

Par principe, avec un enfant, il n'y a pas de consentement 脙聽 l'acte sexuel. Le consentement, c'est justement l'argument des 脗芦loverboys脗禄 aux Pays-Bas ou des 脗芦grooming gangs脗禄 au Royaume-Uni. En effet, certaines jeunes mineures ont voulu partir avec leur pr脙漏dateur qu'elles aimaient et qui les fascinait. La notion de consentement les aurait-elle prot脙漏g脙漏es? Non, bien au contraire. Donc le principe est simple: pas de consentement sexuel quand on parle d'enfants, il s'agit juste d'un crime.

脗聽脗聽Gheorghe Piperea (ECR). 芒聙聯 Doamn脛聝 pre脠聶edint脛聝, internetul a devenit periculos pentru c脛聝 dezinformeaz脛聝 socio 脠聶i psihologic, av脙垄nd ca 脠聸int脛聝 copii care nu au 脙庐nc脛聝 discern脛聝m脙垄ntul complet format. Mai ales sub impactul inteligen脠聸ei artificiale, re脠聸elele de socializare 脠聶i platformele digitale determin脛聝 deformarea comportamentului normal al copiilor.

P脙垄n脛聝 la v脙垄rsta de 16 ani, copilul nu se poate c脛聝s脛聝tori, nu poate munci legal, nici semna valabil acte juridice. Nu ar trebui s脛聝 poat脛聝 decide schimbarea de sex 脙庐nainte de aceast脛聝 v脙垄rst脛聝 脠聶i mai ales, ar trebui protejat de pedofili.

Raportul rateaz脛聝 fix aceste dou脛聝 mari amenin脠聸脛聝ri la adresa inocen脠聸ei copiilor: manipularea 脙庐n vederea schimb脛聝rii de gen 脠聶i sugestia subliminal脛聝 c脛聝 pedofilia este o practic脛聝 sexual脛聝 oarecare, iar nu o crim脛聝 oribil脛聝.

Uniunea European脛聝 脠聶i statele membre ar trebui s脛聝 acorde mai mult脛聝 aten脠聸ie acestor curente criminale, care sunt forme de abuz sexual 脙庐n ele 脙庐nsele, iar nu s脛聝 iroseasc脛聝 bani 脠聶i resurse cu ideologia de gen.

脗聽脗聽Ana Miguel Pedro (PPE). 芒聙聯 Senhora Presidente, Senhores Deputados, este n脙拢o 脙漏 um debate t脙漏cnico ou ideol脙鲁gico. 脙聣 um tema que n脙拢o pertence 脙聽 esquerda nem 脙聽 direita. Pertence 脙聽 dec脙陋ncia.

Em Portugal, tr脙陋s crian脙搂as por dia s脙拢o v脙颅timas de abuso sexual. Muitas dessas agress脙碌es ocorrem onde a crian脙搂a deveria estar mais protegida, e n脙鲁s continuamos a debater, muitas vezes com luvas de veludo, como se houvesse espa脙搂o para a ambiguidade, como se fosse poss脙颅vel legislar com delicadeza sobre a monstruosidade.

N脙拢o h脙隆 crime mais hediondo que uma sociedade possa tolerar, n脙拢o h脙隆 dor mais profunda nem falha institucional mais grave. Assumimos este combate como uma prioridade pol脙颅tica. Queremos corrigir as falhas legislativas que deixam as crian脙搂as mais expostas hoje do que nunca. Assistimos 脙聽 industrializa脙搂脙拢o digital do abuso infantil com um sistema de dete脙搂脙拢o t脙拢o limitado que, na pr脙隆tica, deixa a maior parte do material ilegal impune. Queremos endurecer penas com equipara脙搂脙拢o de crimes online e offline, queremos garantir que as v脙颅timas tenham apoio real, que os agressores enfrentem, sem exce脙搂脙拢o, a justi脙搂a. Queremos o agravamento da moldura penal e o aumento da prescri脙搂脙拢o para crimes sexuais contra menores.

O CDS vai ainda mais longe; apoiamos a criminaliza脙搂脙拢o da exposi脙搂脙拢o de menores a conte脙潞dos pornogr脙隆ficos, quando n脙拢o existem mecanismos eficazes de verifica脙搂脙拢o de idade 芒聙聯芒聙聯 uma lacuna que o texto ainda n脙拢o cobre.

Se h脙隆 uma linha que nenhuma sociedade sente que pode cruzar 脙漏 esta. Que este Parlamento esteja 脙聽 altura da coragem que cada crian脙搂a v脙颅tima mereceu e nunca viu.

脗聽脗聽Jo脙拢o Oliveira (The Left), Pergunta segundo o procedimento 脗芦cart脙拢o azul脗禄. 芒聙聯 Senhor Deputada Ana Miguel Pedro, a senhora deputada falou dos diversos contextos em que ocorrem situa脙搂脙碌es de abuso de crian脙搂as. A primeira pergunta que lhe queria fazer tem que ver precisamente com isso.

脗聽脗聽Laura Ballar脙颅n Cereza (S&D). 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidenta, en Espa脙卤a, seis de cada diez adolescentes se han visto expuestos a contenido er脙鲁tico y pornogr脙隆fico sin buscarlo. Por eso, la revisi脙鲁n de la Directiva relativa a la lucha contra los abusos sexuales y la pornograf脙颅a infantil que hoy votamos en esta C脙隆mara supone un gran paso adelante, porque ampl脙颅a la definici脙鲁n de lo que representa el consentimiento y los abusos sexuales a menores, incluyendo espec脙颅ficamente los desnudos falseados por inteligencia artificial (fake nudes)脗聽o tambi脙漏n los casos de captaci脙鲁n de menores (grooming).

脗聽脗聽Chiara Gemma (ECR). 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, signor Commissario, quando parliamo di abusi sui minori non stiamo parlando di numeri. 脗聽脗聽Isabel Wiseler-Lima (PPE). 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, des milliers et des millions d'images de vid脙漏os p脙漏dopornographiques sont disponibles en ligne, en temps r脙漏el ou en diff脙漏r脙漏. Les cr脙漏ations d'intelligence artificielle sont d脙漏velopp脙漏es 脙聽 partir de centaines de milliers d'images bien r脙漏elles. Nous ne pouvons ni banaliser, ni accepter, ni nous taire.

Et puis, la justice doit punir. Il ne peut y avoir prescription pour ces crimes commis contre des enfants. Nous ne pouvons accepter la libre circulation de manuels indiquant aux p脙漏docriminels comment gagner la confiance des enfants, comment abuser de b脙漏b脙漏s sans laisser de traces. Et nous ne pouvons en aucune fa脙搂on consid脙漏rer qu'il y ait eu consentement de la part de l'enfant. Jamais. Il n'y a pas de consentement de la part d'un enfant.

Il est inconcevable qu'il puisse y avoir impunit脙漏 pour les p脙漏docriminels et tous ceux qui les assistent dans l'ex脙漏cution de leurs crimes. C'est pourquoi il faudra veiller 脙聽 ce que, par apr脙篓s, cette l脙漏gislation si importante soit rapidement mise en 脜聯uvre dans tous les pays de l'Union.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Lara Magoni (ECR). 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, ci sono silenzi che gridano: quelli di milioni di bambini intrappolati in immagini che non svaniscono mai, replicate all'infinito. Non 脙篓 solo un crimine subito, 脙篓 una condanna che dura tutta la vita.

La direttiva che discutiamo 脙篓 un passo necessario perch脙漏 viviamo in un mondo in cui le tecnologie digitali, se non governate, diventano strumenti spietati di abuso. Oggi la minaccia ha il volto dell'intelligenza artificiale, la voce di un avatar, la forma ingannevole di un deep fake. Questi contenuti saranno riconosciuti come materiale pedopornografico. Chi li crea, diffonde o possiede sar脙聽 punito.

Accolgo con convinzione l'abolizione della prescrizione. Troppe vittime parlano solo da adulte. La giustizia deve esserci anche tardi, perch脙漏 il dolore non ha scadenza e nemmeno i loro diritti. Le piattaforme digitali, in linea con il DSA, avranno un ruolo chiave. Chi permette la diffusione 脙篓 corresponsabile. La tutela dei bambini deve essere la nostra priorit脙聽. Ogni esitazione 脙篓 un tradimento, ogni silenzio un lasciapassare per il male.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Fran脙搂ois-Xavier Bellamy (PPE). 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, Monsieur le Commissaire, aujourd'hui nous allons voter ce texte essentiel pour la protection des enfants contre les abus sexuels, une cause qui d脙漏passe tous les clivages dans cet h脙漏micycle.

Notre devoir est de garantir leur int脙漏grit脙漏, et une menace p脙篓se sur cette int脙漏grit脙漏 que nous proposons d'ajouter aujourd'hui 脙聽 ce texte: c'est celle de l'exposition aux contenus pornographiques, qui, aujourd'hui, repr脙漏sente une r脙漏alit脙漏 pour des millions d'enfants dans nos pays.

En Europe, l'脙垄ge moyen de la premi脙篓re exposition se situe entre neuf et onze ans. Des enfants qui sont aujourd'hui expos脙漏s 脙聽 ces images sont bless脙漏s pour leur vie enti脙篓re, traumatis脙漏s pour beaucoup, emp脙陋ch脙漏s de construire normalement leur vie affective et leur image d'eux-m脙陋mes. Il s'agit bien d'un acc脙漏l脙漏rateur de toutes les violences sexuelles commises contre des enfants, de toutes les violences parfois commises par des mineurs sur des mineurs. Il s'agit aussi, en tant que telle, d'une violence sexuelle, d'une atteinte 脙聽 l'int脙漏grit脙漏 de ces enfants, 脙聽 leur int脙漏grit脙漏 psychique, affective, et toutes les donn脙漏es de la science, de la m脙漏decine, de la psychologie et de la psychiatrie convergent aujourd'hui pour le montrer.

Nous devons faire en sorte que les plateformes qui, aujourd'hui, font leurs affaires sur l'absence de protection des enfants soient enfin contraintes d'agir. Des ann脙漏es ont 脙漏t脙漏 pass脙漏es 脙聽 n脙漏gocier avec ces plateformes sur la base d'un droit commercial qui, en r脙漏alit脙漏, n'est pas pertinent pour traiter de ce sujet. Il s'agit bien d'un cas de droit p脙漏nal. Nous devons agir ensemble. Votons ensemble, chers coll脙篓gues, pour rendre une enfance aux enfants.

(L'orateur accepte une question carton bleu)

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Petras Gra脜戮ulis (ESN), pak脛聴lus m脛聴lyn脛聟j脛聟 kortel脛聶 pateiktas klausimas. 芒聙聯 Gerbiama pirmininke, gerbiamas kolega, Europos Parlamentas, mano manymu, yra tiesiog blogio 脜隆altinis. I脜隆 脛聧ia kyla propagavimas seksualini脜鲁 i脜隆krypim脜鲁, g脛聴j脜鲁 parad脜鲁, kitoki脜鲁 nusikaltim脜鲁, kas ypatingai daro 脜戮al脛聟 vaikams. Tai gal 脛聧ia mes imkim脛聴s priemoni脜鲁 ir sustabdykime 脜隆it脛聟 propagand脛聟, ir tada bus ma脜戮iau seksualini脜鲁 nusikaltim脜鲁. Viena ranka j脜芦s baud脜戮iate, o kita ranka j脜芦s matote, j脜芦s skatinate nusikaltimus. Kaip tai vertinate?

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Fran脙搂ois-Xavier Bellamy (PPE), r脙漏ponse carton bleu. 芒聙聯 Il me semble que la protection des enfants contre les abus sexuels est un sujet trop important pour pouvoir 脙陋tre travesti dans des clivages absurdes. C'est un sujet qui doit tous nous r脙漏unir. Et je voudrais dire simplement que, sur cette question majeure de l'exposition des enfants 脙聽 la pornographie, il n'y a pas de clivage politique qui tienne.

Aujourd'hui, nous avons une occasion historique de contraindre enfin les plateformes pornographiques 脙聽 sortir de leur d脙漏ni de r脙漏alit脙漏, 脙聽 sortir 脙漏videmment des profits qu'elles font pour pouvoir continuer de prosp脙漏rer sur la vie de nos enfants. Notre devoir, c'est d'agir ensemble et tous ceux qui chercheront des excuses pour ne pas s'y engager, je le crois malheureusement, fragiliseront cette cause qui devrait nous rassembler.

脗聽脗聽Maria Grapini (S&D). 芒聙聯 Doamn脛聝 pre脠聶edint脛聝, domnule comisar, stima脠聸i colegi, vorbim despre combaterea abuzului sexual 脠聶i exploatarea sexual脛聝. Cum s脛聝-脠聶i dea consim脠聸脛聝m脙垄ntul un copil de 6 ani, de 7 ani, au fost situa脠聸ii de copii de 5 ani abuza脠聸i sexual. Cum s脛聝-脠聶i dea consim脠聸脛聝m脙垄ntul? Nu, nu este vorba despre acest lucru.

脗聽脗聽Sebastian Tynkkynen (ECR). 芒聙聯 Arvoisa puhemies, helvetiss脙陇 on erityinen paikka niille, jotka ahdistelevat, hyv脙陇ksik脙陇ytt脙陇v脙陇t ja raiskaavat lapsia. Monet viel脙陇p脙陇 uusivat t脙陇llaisia rikoksia kerta toisensa j脙陇lkeen. Puhumme hirvi脙露ist脙陇 keskuudessamme.

Oli kyse sitten netiss脙陇, kaduilla tai pimeiss脙陇 huoneissa tapahtuvista teoista, silkkihansikkaat ja sensitiivisyys pit脙陇脙陇 rangaistuksia pohdittaessa heitt脙陇脙陇 romukoppaan. Mit脙陇 tiukempi linja n脙陇it脙陇 rikollisia kohtaan, sen parempi. Yht脙陇脙陇n uutta rikollista emme rajojemme sis脙陇puolelle tarvitse.

Tuen voimakkaasti niit脙陇 toimenpiteit脙陇, joilla Suomesta ja Euroopasta tehd脙陇脙陇n lapsillemme turvallisempi paikka olla. T脙陇m脙陇 koskee toimia niin rajoillamme kuin rajojen sis脙陇puolellakin. Lapsilla on oikeus el脙陇脙陇 lapsen el脙陇m脙陇脙陇 vailla pelkoa.

脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Nina Carberry (PPE). 芒聙聯 Madam脗聽President, thank you to the rapporteur for his great work on this file. The directive on combating child sexual abuse is a welcome move in shielding our children in both online and offline spheres. As we know, the internet has shaped our world in so many positive way, but it has also opened up terrifying avenues for our children.

I want to use my time to focus on two key risks: one, how easy it is for minors to gain access to explicit content online; and two, the current ease for abusers to hide behind fake profiles.

It's troubling to see how easily children can bypass age checks online. A click of a checkbox with false date of birth and suddenly they have access to harmful content. The Commission must bring forward robust and mandatory age and identity verification checks to combat this. The same goes for those hiding behind fake profiles. It makes detection, prevention and prosecution an uphill battle for authorities. Europe must keep the pace.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

I脜隆ties sveikinimas tiek prane脜隆脛聴jui, tiek visiems 脜隆e脜隆脛聴liniams prane脜隆脛聴jams 芒聙聯 puikiai padarytas dokumentas. Direktyva sudaro s脛聟lygas, j脛聟 perkeliant 脜隆alyse nar脛聴se, dar daugiau sustiprinti ir atkreipti d脛聴mes脛炉 脛炉 tas vietas, kur i脜隆 ties脜鲁 dar reikia 脜隆alims nar脛聴ms pa脛聧ioms apsispr脛聶sti sustiprinimo ir prevencijos kryptim. Ta脛聧iau a脜隆 taip pat noriu pasteb脛聴ti, kad 脛聧ia, 脜隆ioje sal脛聴je, kalbant apie vaik脜鲁 seksualin脛炉 i脜隆naudojim脛聟, apie pedofilij脛聟, kalbant apie tok脛炉 脜戮iaur脜鲁 nusikaltim脛聟, staiga imama savo kalbas nukreipti prie脜隆 脜戮mogaus teises, prie脜隆 seksualines ma脜戮umas, nesuprantant, kad heteroseksual脜芦s 脜戮mon脛聴s taip pat daro baisius nusikaltimus, kaip ir ma脜戮a dalis homoseksuali脜鲁 脜戮moni脜鲁. 脛聦ia mes turime dr脛聟siai pasakyti: bet kokios neapykantos kalbos kurstymo pasekm脛聴s bus negatyvios. Ir a脜隆 ypatingai adresuoju tai tiems radikaliems de脜隆iniesiems ir nacionalistams. O direktyva reikalinga mums visiems.

脗聽脗聽Annam脙隆ria Vicsek (PfE). 芒聙聯 Tisztelt Eln脙露k Asszony! Gyermekeink egyre nagyobb vesz脙漏lyben vannak az online t脙漏rben. Ez az eur脙鲁pai polg脙隆rok 92%-脙隆nak v脙漏lem脙漏nye az Eurobarom脙漏ter szerint, 脙漏s a sz脙录l脜聭k joggal agg脙鲁dnak.

Mi, magyarok pedig vil脙隆gosan kimondjuk: a gyermekek nem v脙隆lhatnak sem az online ragadoz脙鲁k, sem az ideol脙鲁giai k脙颅s脙漏rletek 脙隆ldozat脙隆v脙隆. Ez脙漏rt t脙隆mogatjuk az 脙潞j uni脙鲁s szab脙隆lyoz脙隆st, amely egys脙漏ges defin脙颅ci脙鲁kat, szigor脙潞bb b脙录ntet脙漏seket 脙漏s az online platformok felel脜聭ss脙漏gre von脙隆s脙隆t 脙颅rja el脜聭, de a javaslat figyelembe kell, hogy vegye a tag脙隆llamok kultur脙隆lis k脙录l脙露nbs脙漏geit 脙漏s alkotm脙隆nyos priorit脙隆sait is, 脙漏s nem t脙漏vesztheti szem el脜聭l a tag脙隆llami hat脙隆sk脙露r脙露ket sem.

Ugyanakkor hat脙隆rozottan elutas脙颅tjuk, hogy Br脙录sszel a progressz脙颅v liberalizmus 脙录r脙录gy脙漏n genderaktivist脙隆kat k脙录ldj脙露n az iskol脙隆inkba, vagy r脙隆nk er脜聭ltesse az explicit 脙漏s aberr脙隆lt szexu脙隆lis tartalmakkal teli felvonul脙隆sokat a k脙露ztereinken. Magyarorsz脙隆gon 2021 脙鲁ta hat脙隆lyban van egy szigor脙潞 gyermekv脙漏delmi t脙露rv脙漏ny, amely val脙鲁di v脙漏delmet ny脙潞jt a kiskor脙潞aknak.

脗聽脗聽Jo脙拢o Oliveira (The Left). 芒聙聯 Senhora Presidente,脗聽Senhor Comiss脙隆rio Brunner, n脙拢o podemos poupar esfor脙搂os na luta contra os abusos sexuais de crian脙搂as. Essa luta exige muito mais do que medidas penais.

A proposta de diretiva que discutimos centra-se em medidas penais destinadas a combater os abusos depois de acontecerem e ignora as medidas de preven脙搂脙拢o dos abusos.

Precisamos de medidas de preven脙搂脙拢o que garantam o funcionamento adequado e seguro das institui脙搂脙碌es e espa脙搂os de socializa脙搂脙拢o das crian脙搂as, sejam eles creches, escolas, associa脙搂脙碌es desportivas ou culturais.

Precisamos de educa脙搂脙拢o sexual e de medidas de acompanhamento adequado da sa脙潞de e do bem-estar das crian脙搂as e da sua inser脙搂脙拢o social e familiar, bem como forma脙搂脙拢o para a preven脙搂脙拢o e dete脙搂脙拢o precoce de situa脙搂脙碌es de abuso. Em mat脙漏ria penal, as medidas a adotar devem ser da compet脙陋ncia exclusiva dos Estados芒聙聭Membros.

A proposta de diretiva arrisca-se a ser ineficaz por se focar apenas no aumento das penas, por desarticular normas penais nacionais relevantes e por n脙拢o refor脙搂ar os instrumentos de combate 脙聽 difus脙拢o de material com imagens de abusos sexuais de crian脙搂as e 脙聽 sua explora脙搂脙拢o para fins sexuais.

Precisamos de melhores solu脙搂脙碌es do que aquelas que s脙拢o propostas.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Alessandra Moretti (S&D). 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, nel 2022 le segnalazioni di sfruttamento sessuale online sui minori sono aumentate di trenta volte rispetto al 2010. In rete proliferano dirette streaming, canali dedicati, immagini deep fake e generate con l'intelligenza artificiale, che permettono agli autori di nascondersi e sfuggire a sanzioni penali.

L'Unione europea deve reagire con fermezza, a partire dall'ampliamento della definizione di materiale pedopornografico, includendo contenuti generati con l'intelligenza artificiale e manuali di abuso con pene severe certe, che non possono essere raggirate.

Serve un approccio che metta al centro i minori con indagini rispettose e supporto psicologico adeguato. Per proteggerli davvero serve anche una cooperazione stretta tra gli Stati, agenzie come Europol ed Eurojust e ONG, perch脙漏 la rete non conosce confini e nemmeno la nostra protezione deve averne.

脗聽脗聽Sun脛聧ana Glavak (PPE). 芒聙聯 Po脜隆tovana predsjedavaju脛聡a, po脜隆tovani povjereni脛聧e, kolega Lenaers, kolegice i kolege,脗聽za脜隆tita djece od seksualnog zlostavljanja i iskori脜隆tavanja nije pitanje nadle脜戮nosti ili ideologije, ja mislim da je to pitanje zdravog razuma i da tako trebamo gledati na to.

Samo u 2023. godini pogledajte brojke u Europskoj uniji, vi脜隆e od 30 milijuna prijava sadr脜戮aja koji uklju脛聧uje seksualno zlostavljanje djece. Brojke su zastra脜隆uju脛聡e. Digitalni prostor postao je glavno bojno polje. Preko 85% materijala koji uklju脛聧uje seksualno zlostavljanje djece otkriva se na platformama.

Dat 脛聡u jedan dobar primjer iz moje zemlje. Hrvatska je jedna od rijetkih zemalja koje su uskladile nacionalne zakone s Lanzarotskom konvencijom i aktivno razvija multidisciplinarne protokole za intervenciju. Me脛聭utim, ni jedna dr脜戮ava 脛聧lanica ne mo脜戮e sama. Na脜隆a je du脜戮nost, kao zakonodavca, stvoriti okvir u kojem ni jedno dijete, bilo u Strasbourgu, Zagrebu ili Tallinnu ne postaje 脜戮rtvom zato 脜隆to institucije nisu bile brze, suradnja nije bila u脛聧inkovita ili su algoritmi gledali na drugu stranu.

Stoga mislim da je direktiva iznimno va脜戮na. Kriminalizacija, nezastarijevanje i mehanizmi prijave. To je na脜隆a odgovornost.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Lukas Sieper (NI). 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin, liebe Menschen Europas! In meiner Heimatstadt Bergisch Gladbach kam es vor wenigen Jahren zu einem schwerwiegenden Kindesmissbrauchsfall. 脙聹ber Jahre hatte der T脙陇ter Terabytes von kinderpornografischem Material kommerziell verbreitet und machte dabei insbesondere seine eigene Tochter zum Hauptopfer. Was bremste die Aufkl脙陇rung? Der deutsche F脙露deralismus, aber auch die Zersplitterung der Zust脙陇ndigkeiten zwischen den Mitgliedstaaten der Europ脙陇ischen Union im digitalen Raum.

Deshalb sage ich, ja, europ脙陇ische Harmonisierung von Kinderschutz bedeutet eine 脙聹bertragung von Zust脙陇ndigkeiten, aber eben eine, die Leben sch脙录tzt, die daf脙录r sorgt, dass T脙陇ter nicht mehr durch die L脙录cken im f脙露deralen und nationalstaatlichen Dickicht entkommen k脙露nnen und dass der Schutz von Kindern nicht mehr an der Staatsgrenze aufh脙露rt. Wenn ein T脙陇ter europ脙陇isch denkt, dann m脙录ssen wir es auch.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽脗聽

(Fine della procedura "catch the eye")

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Magnus Brunner, Member of the Commission. 芒聙聯 Madam President, thanks to everyone for this discussion and for your interventions. I'm glad that there's such a clear consensus on this matter. And together we aim to criminalise child sexual abuse and exploitation and to adopt effective penalties and also to uphold higher standards for prevention, on the one hand, but also for investigation, for prosecution, and also for assistance to victims, of course. And I think that this recast directive will bring us there definitely. And we need to conclude the legislative process as quickly as possible.

This recast is, of course, a crucial pillar, but the puzzle against child sexual abuse will not be completed without the regulation, which was already proposed in 2022, as the rapporteur also mentioned before. The regulation focuses on prevention, requiring tech companies to address systemic risks to children, and I really do encourage the Council to continue its work to adopt this general approach on the regulation. We all know that the interim regulation expires in April 2026, and, as we also try to stress in our ProtectEU internal security strategy, it is essential to establish a permanent legal framework.

We have a very short deadline looming over us before we become actually blind to what is happening online. So we do have to do everything in our power to ensure that this is not the case and I'm very glad that the Danish Presidency put this topic on the top of their agenda. Our children, I think, deserve nothing less.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Jeroen Lenaers, rapporteur. 芒聙聯 Madam脗聽President, thank you to all colleagues participating in the debate today. Thank you to all the colleagues, the shadows from the other groups, the colleagues from the FEMM Committee, for the work throughout this whole procedure so far.

It has come to this point today where we will vote, I hope, with the same overwhelming majority as we already did at the committee level to protect our children even better.

Thanks also to the Commission for the proposal they have done, but also for the commitment and the endorsement of the Parliament's position today.

Of course, as we see in many of these debates, a lot of colleagues show up to take our responsibility as lawmakers, to provide for good laws for the protection of our children; and then there are some who show up simply for polarisation and politicisation, only for the benefit of their own echo chambers.

But I would like to say to the first group, let's stick together. Let's do this in a constructive way. Let's make this law a reality as soon as possible.

I would also like to ask to be very precise when we're speaking about this legislation. I heard some colleagues complaining about the concept of consent in this legislation, saying that children can never give consent for sexual relations, and of course, this is true.

But we also have to realise that the age of sexual consent in many Member States is not the same as the age of adulthood. Specifically for this group of minors, it is absolutely important that we have a clear definition of consent 芒聙聯 that we have a clear rule, as the Commissioner already said, that freezing or not saying anything can never be understood as consent, specifically because we need to protect also this group of children.

So, thank you all very much. I count on your support in the vote today. I count on your support in the negotiations with the Member States to make sure that the level of ambition that we have here in this Parliament today is at least matched also on the Council side.

Like I said as a conclusion to my first introduction here, protecting children is not a choice 芒聙聯 it is our deepest and most profound responsibility. Let's live up to that responsibility together.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Presidente. 芒聙聯 La discussione 脙篓 chiusa.

La votazione si svolger脙聽 oggi.

ES pateikta 1,3脗聽mln. prane脜隆im脜鲁 apie seksualin脛聶 prievart脛聟 prie脜隆 vaikus, kurie buvo susij脛聶 su daugiau kaip 3,4脗聽mln. vaizd脜鲁 ir vaizdo 脛炉ra脜隆脜鲁. Visame pasaulyje prane脜隆im脜鲁 padaug脛聴jo nuo 1脗聽mln. 2010脗聽m. iki beveik 35,9脗聽mln. 2023脗聽m., 脛炉skaitant 105,6脗聽mln. vaizd脜鲁 ir vaizdo 脛炉ra脜隆脜鲁. Nerim脛聟 kelia tai, kad did脜戮ioji dauguma auk脜鲁 yra mergait脛聴s. 脗聽脗聽Jagna Marczu脜聜ajtis-Walczak (PPE), na pi脜聸mie. 芒聙聯 Dzieci nie mog脛聟 by脛聡 nara脜录one na ogl脛聟danie w internecie tre脜聸ci nieodpowiednich dla ich wieku, 脜聜atwo te脜录 mog脛聟 zosta脛聡 poddane manipulacji czy nadu脜录yciom seksualnym. Edukacja w tej sprawie to jedno, ale obowi脛聟zki wynikaj脛聟ce z takich regulacji jak akt o us脜聜ugach cyfrowych to realne obowi脛聟zki dla platform internetowych, by m脙鲁c weryfikowa脛聡 wiek u脜录ytkownik脙鲁w i dostosowywa脛聡 odpowiednie dla nich tre脜聸ci.

To indywidualne i delikatne kwestie, dlatego specjalne prawa dla ofiar powinny zosta脛聡 wdro脜录one jak najszybciej, by zapobiega脛聡 traumom w p脙鲁脜潞niejszym 脜录yciu.

脗聽脗聽Jadwiga Wi脜聸niewska (ECR), na pi脜聸mie. 芒聙聯 脜職redni wiek pierwszego kontaktu z pornografi脛聟 w Europie to 9芒聙聯11 lat. Te obrazy zostaj脛聟 z dzie脛聡mi na ca脜聜e 脜录ycie. S脛聟 脜潞r脙鲁d脜聜em b脙鲁lu, zaburze脜聞 to脜录samo脜聸ci, a cz脛聶sto tak脜录e przemocy odtwarzanej p脙鲁脜潞niej wobec r脙鲁wie脜聸nik脙鲁w. To nie s脛聟 tylko 芒聙聻tre脜聸ci w Internecie芒聙聺 芒聙聯 to realne, psychiczne nadu脜录ycie. A je脜聸li dodamy do tego materia脜聜y generowane przez sztuczn脛聟 inteligencj脛聶, podr脛聶czniki dla pedofil脙鲁w, transmisje na 脜录ywo z przemoc脛聟 wobec dzieci 芒聙聯 skala zagro脜录enia staje si脛聶 przyt脜聜aczaj脛聟ca.

Musimy dzia脜聜a脛聡. Ale skuteczna ochrona dzieci nie mo脜录e oznacza脛聡 ko脜聞ca prywatno脜聸ci.
